overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a high-speed night ride through Night City's rain-slicked highways. The player navigates through moderate traffic while passing towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by vibrant holographic billboards and neon signage, with atmospheric haze and wet road reflections creating a dense cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: accelerating from 90 to over 100 km/h on the open highway
entering denser urban area with taller illuminated buildings closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed, weaving between vehicles while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with red taillights being followed at high speed
dark sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: tall illuminated office towers with grid-like window patterns rising against the night sky
tall illuminated office towers with grid-like window patterns rising against the night sky
yellow concrete barrier with metal rail running parallel to the road
tall pole lights casting white illumination onto the wet road surface
large floating advertisement displaying purple and yellow visuals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide multi-lane highway at night, with the motorcycle accelerating to over 100 km/h. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance on both sides, while holographic billboards and street lights begin to appear. The road is wet with rain reflections, and the player weaves through moderate traffic while approaching the denser urban core.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with holographic ceiling displays

events.description: entering covered highway underpass with massive holographic displays overhead
shifting from open sky neon lighting to artificial holographic ceiling illumination
decelerating from 80 to 60 km/h while navigating the covered section

agents.ego_description: slowing down while riding through the covered highway section, passing under massive holographic ceiling displays

notable_agents.action: green and white van traveling in the adjacent right lane

entered.detail: massive overhead holographic screen spanning the highway width showing colorful abstract patterns and advertisements
thick concrete support pillars for the overhead highway structure
thick concrete support pillars for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a semi-covered highway section where massive holographic displays cover the ceiling, creating a tunnel-like effect with shifting colors. The speed decreases as the bike passes between thick concrete support pillars. The lighting changes from open sky to a mix of neon and artificial overhead glow, while skyscrapers now appear closer on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with dense neon signage and layered billboards

events.description: exiting covered section back to open highway with visible sky
accelerating aggressively from 80 back to over 100 km/h
entering district with extremely dense holographic advertising on both sides

agents.ego_description: accelerating aggressively to over 110 km/h, weaving through traffic past glowing billboards and neon building facades

notable_agents.action: green van maintaining speed in the right lane alongside the motorcycle

entered.detail: giant floating advertisement displaying human figures and product imagery
building exterior covered in bright illuminated signage and colored window lights
elevated road structure crossing above the current highway level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered section, the motorcycle accelerates back to high speed on the open highway. The environment features dense neon signage with large holographic billboards floating alongside the road and buildings covered in illuminated facades. The bike passes under highway overpasses while maintaining high velocity through the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with heavy traffic and complex highway interchanges

events.description: approaching slower traffic ahead, beginning to brake from high speed
heavy braking from 90 down to 26 km/h due to traffic congestion
navigating through dense cluster of vehicles with red brake lights ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing dramatically to navigate through heavy traffic congestion, braking hard to avoid vehicles ahead

notable_agents.action: multiple vehicles ahead with red brake lights causing significant slowdown
silver car merging into the lane from the left side

entered.detail: large glowing pink neon sign reading HOTEL mounted on building facade
multiple layered digital advertisements stacked vertically on building side
complex multi-level highway interchange with glowing signage above

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters the densest commercial area with a prominent pink neon hotel sign and stacked billboards covering the buildings. Traffic density increases significantly, forcing the motorcycle to brake heavily from over 110 km/h down to 26 km/h. The player navigates through a congested cluster of vehicles while passing under complex overhead highway structures in the heart of the neon-lit district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed motorcycle ride that transitions from an open, rain-slicked highway into the dense, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins with the bike accelerating through moderate traffic on a wide road, where glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards emerge from the distance against a wet pavement. As the camera enters a semi-covered highway section, the open sky is replaced by a tunnel-like canopy of shifting holographic displays and massive concrete pillars that momentarily slow the pace. The scene then opens back into the open air, where the motorcycle regains high velocity beneath highway overpasses and alongside towering buildings covered in illuminated facades. Finally, the environment shifts into a congested urban core dominated by a prominent pink neon hotel sign and stacked billboards, forcing the bike to brake heavily while navigating through a thick cluster of vehicles.
